name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## What you want to do
<!-- Describe the workflow or capability that's missing. Focus on the
problem you're trying to solve, not a specific implementation. -->


## Why current options don't cut it
<!-- What do you do today and why is it painful? -->


## Sketch of what you have in mind (optional)
<!-- Mockups, links to similar tools, rough code shape. -->


## Are you willing to work on this?
<!-- "yes, with guidance" / "yes" / "no, just suggesting" — all fine. -->
